sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; const Dashboard = () => { const [darkMode] = useState(false); const username = localStorage.getItem('username'); const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken'); const [info, setInfo] = useState({}); const [error, setError] = useState(''); useEffect(() => { fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/teacher-info/', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, }, }) .then(res => { if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch teacher info'); return res.json(); }) .then(data => setInfo(data)) .catch(() => setError('Failed to load teacher info.')); }, []); return (

📊 School Management Dashboard

Hi, {username} 👋

Welcome, {username}

👤 My Info

Username: {info.username || 'N/A'}

Email: {info.email || 'N/A'}

Teacher ID: {info.teacher_id || 'N/A'}

{error &&
{error}
}
📚 Students

Manage all registered students.

👨‍🏫 Teachers

View and update teacher records.

📘 Subjects

Explore subjects offered by the school.

🏫 Classrooms

Assign students and teachers to classes.

📅 Timetable

Manage class schedules and time slots.

✅ Attendance

Track daily attendance records.

🏅 Grades

Enter and view student grades.

); }; export default Dashboard;
